subcodes.first_line: O 'Aṭá! The Creator of heaven remembereth thee from the prison of 'Akká, and summoneth thee unto the Most Exalted Horizon, and causeth thee to hear the rustling [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عطاء یذکرک فاطر السماء فی سجن عکاء و یدعوک الی الافق الاعلی و یسمعک صریر
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment
